title: althaea occidentalis
intro: Althaea occidentalis, also known as Western marshmallow, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mallow family. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which are attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Althaea occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Althaea occidentalis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also often used as a natural ingredient in food and cosmetics.
